expectations.evidence: '这是一个明确的技术方案，但我需要先退一步搞清楚它要解决的问题'
Asks '最让团队头疼的是哪类问题？' with A/B/C/D

expectations.text: Does NOT accept React as given
expectations.evidence: No React tech stack, no migration strategies. Stays in problem space.
'不同的痛点会导向完全不同的重写策略、范围和优先级，甚至可能根本不需要全量重写'
No '好的，我来用 idea-flow...' - starts directly with the observation about the solution
